findings: staged snapshot excludes runtime.py, web_ui.py, and ui_shell.py
browser posts JSON.stringify({ ui_action: uiAction }) and server blocks command_id payloads
sync_runtime, set_mode_stable, and set_mode_managed require confirmation and post-action refresh
launch_smoke is check-only, does not require confirmation, and does not claim host-client launch success
action panel is separate from live overview truth and live refresh still comes from /api/live-readonly
forbidden launch_client, stable_repair_apply, account lifecycle, and rollout/stage actions are not exposed as data-ui-action
no direct state/log/runtime file reads were introduced
tests and contour artifacts are staged
residual_risks: wild_boar_proxy/runtime.py is dirty outside this contour and must remain unstaged
live runtime mutation browser smoke was intentionally avoided without a separate owner live-mutation marker; fake runner smoke was used for UI behavior
launch_smoke still invokes launch smoke --json; this is accepted only as a check-only runtime smoke action and not host-client launch success
